blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
